array.string: HOUR=$(date -u +%H | sed 's/^0//'); MIN=$(date -u +%M | sed 's/^0//'); DAY=$(date -u +%u); if [ "$DAY" -lt 1 ] || [ "$DAY" -gt 5 ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ "$HOUR" -lt 7 ] || [ "$HOUR" -gt 21 ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ "$HOUR" -eq 21 ] && [ "$MIN" -ge 30 ]; then exit 0; fi; CONTAINER_PID=$(/usr/local/bin/docker inspect --format '{{.State.Pid}}' gold-trader 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); if [ "$CONTAINER_PID" = "0" ] || [ -z "$CONTAINER_PID" ]; then echo "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC') container not running"; exit 0; fi; echo "$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC') Keeping awake PID $CONTAINER_PID"; exec /usr/bin/caffeinate -i -s -w "$CONTAINER_PID"
